_comment: Locked expected values for the anchor fixtures — from docs/BUILD_BRIEF.md §0.5, examples/README.md, and visual inspection of the rendered pages. 'Fixed' means these numbers, not a feeling.

db-schedules/syntegral/25057_DB-Schedule.notes: Roughly one board per page across 13 pages; DB-MECH is ONE 18-way TP&N board stitched across pp 11–13 (54 phase-slots), not 3 fragments. DB-AV = 7 equipped + 4 spare + 1 SPD (way 12), 12-way SP&N.

consumer-units/Dundee_CU-Circuit-Chart.p.notes: All three CU variants must be captured, not just the first.

schematics/SRP1053-NB1-NB2_LV-Schematic_.notes: Must also yield the 2500A ACB, the F-referenced outgoing devices, and the EVC feeder pillar (28 × 7.4 kW). 'Main panel + a couple of DBs' is a fail.

db-schedules/bam-epo/EPO_Ashfield_Circui.notes: Regression baseline: the ONE dialect the regex extractor parses (parseBamScheduleLine). P1–P5 / T1–T6 legends; 'Serving' + incoming cable ref.

db-schedules/amtech/Broomfield-House_Cir.notes: 32-page multi-board Amtech dialect — roughly one board per page; a big drop past page 1 means pagination/dialect failure.

db-schedules/switchboard-mccb/MCCB-Sched.notes: Has a Summary Index (Ref/Location/Size) — the reconciliation pass must treat listed boards as the expected set.
